headline: Commemorating America 250, BofA Announces $5M Founding Sponsorship of Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library and Continued Commitment to Restoration of More Than 100 Presidential Portraits
summary: As the nation prepares to celebrate its 250th anniversary, Bank of America today announced a new partnership to preserve the legacy of the American presidency. Through a $5 million capital gift to the Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library and the ongoing assessment and conservation of 110 presidential portraits and frames at the Smithsonian's National Portrait Gallery, Bank of America is helping preserve the history of the leaders who defined our nation for generations to come.

headline: S&P 500 Settles At New Record High: Investor Sentiment Improves, Fear & Greed Index Moves To 'Greed' Zone
summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index showed improvement in market sentiment. Stocks rose, with S&P and Nasdaq hitting all-time highs. Trump predicts end to conflict and lower oil prices. Morgan Stanley and Bank of America report strong earnings. U.S. import and export prices rose, while the NY Empire State Manufacturing Index beat expectations. Most sectors on S&P closed negative, except for tech and consumer stocks. Dow down, S&P up, and Nasdaq jumps. Earnings results expected from PepsiCo, Netflix, and Abbott Labs. The Fear & Greed Index measures market sentiment based on fear and greed, with a current reading of 56.5 indicating greed. Index ranges from 0 to 100.

raw.headline: S&P 500 Settles At New Record High: Investor Sentiment Improves, Fear & Greed Index Moves To 'Greed' Zone

Morgan Stanley and Bank of America report strong earnings. U.S. import and export prices rose, while the NY Empire State Manufacturing Index beat expectations. Most sectors on S&P closed negative, except for tech and consumer stocks. Dow down, S&P up, and Nasdaq jumps. Earnings results expected from PepsiCo, Netflix, and Abbott Labs. The Fear & Greed Index measures market sentiment based on fear and greed, with a current reading of 56.5 indicating greed. Index ranges from 0 to 100.

headline: The Wait Is Over: S&P 500 and Nasdaq Hit All-Time Highs as Iran Talks and Bank Earnings Align
summary: Yesterday I noted the S&P 500 was 0.2% away from its January all-time high. Wednesday, that gap closed and the market didn't need a dramatic catalyst to get there. Just a combination of diplomatic progress on Iran, two more strong bank earnings reports, and a tech sector that, quite frankly, has been running out of reasons to sell off.

headline: How The Apple (AAPL) Investment Story Is Shifting On AI, China And Valuation Concerns
summary: Apple’s updated fair value estimate edges from US$295.44 to US$296.46 per share, a small shift that still matters if you are watching where analysts think the stock is roughly priced. The move comes as recent research splits into bullish and bearish camps, with one side leaning on ecosystem strength and services stability, and the other focused on costs, China trends, and an already full valuation. Read on to see what is driving each side of the debate and how you can keep track of this...
